description: Product Description 6 x Charlie Fragranced Body Spray 75ml - Touch We have carefully selected our products that are quality standard of great value. Directions Apply directly to skin, avoiding eyes and mouth. For best results, spray 6-8 inches away from body, focusing on pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind ears. As a travel size, it's perfect for on-the-go use. For a longer-lasting scent, reapply as needed.
